!!TW; RAPED, RAPE, NON-CON ACTIONS IN GENERAL, TOXIC RELATIONSHIP, BLACKMAIL, FORCED RELATIONSHIP, HIDOU!!

(Hidou is awful)

Long intro!!

This is set in the Funamushi Private Deep-Sea Academy AU. However i do know it is supposed to be more tame, but Hidou is literally described as the worse so i would assume he would still be awful even in this AU.

Hidou still does snuff videos here - but he doesnt have a store and uploads them on the dark web instead - it is also said that he does not capture angels in the school and instead does so outside the town (to not be suspicious or whateves..)

Tbh i hate Hidou, he sucks. I wish him the worse, to be honest i ship him with Roc instead, they're suitable for eachother. They both abuse their girlfriends that they dont even deserve.

Also the subordinates are mentioned as classmates and Roc as his friend.

Also gahhh.. why does the time goes so fast!? My birthday is tmrw.. (26th april) and i dont want it.. i wished my birthday were on the last day of the year instead.. it felt like my last birthday was like 4 months ago but nooo.. auhugdiu i hate it.

Oh well... i dont think i have anything else to say here.. shgfidiwishiwereneverbornwhihghghf

7/10 of satanicks subordinates..

(satanick subordinates are the only other mentioned characters so they might get mentioned or show up)
